notes: Netherlands are without defender Quinten Timber (concussion, ruled out) and Jurrien Timber (groin, tournament-absent), while key midfielder Frenkie de Jong is a late fitness doubt with an abdominal complaint and Memphis Depay is managing a thigh issue; Sweden have no confirmed injuries or suspensions and are expected to name an unchanged XI from their 5-1 demolition of Tunisia, with Isak and Gyökeres both fit and firing.
